home.intro: I build digital products and design software architectures. From enterprise platforms to AI-powered tools, from idea to production.
home.no_posts_yet: No posts yet. Working on the first ones.
home.cta_bottom_subtitle: If you want to talk about a project, a collaboration, or just say hi, drop me a message.

projects.zendinit: P2P crowdshipping marketplace connecting people who send packages with travelers already making that trip between Spanish cities.
projects.yappie: Open source voice-to-ticket tool. Speak your ideas and get structured Jira issues automatically with Whisper and GPT-4o.
projects.uyelarte: An art and culture podcast. Each episode covers a different topic to bring art closer to non-specialist audiences.
